title: Woman's body found in burnt-down home
description: GEORGE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp police opened an...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp police opened an inquest docket after a woman, Aileen Ross (39), died in a house fire in New Dawn Park on Tuesday 7 May at about 23:00.

According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, reports at their disposal indicate that emergency personnel responded to the scene.


> Upon arrival, police found the body of a victim who had been inside the structure when it caught fire.


The cause of the fire is yet to be established and police combed the scene for clues.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
